query:
import std.color;
SELECT
fire_risk,
count(tree_id) as tree_count,
case fire_risk
when 'low' then '#2F7D4F'
when 'moderate' then '#D4A14A'
when 'high' then '#A96F49'
else '#7E9D86'
end::string::hex as bucket_color
WHERE fire_risk IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY tree_count DESC;

sources.contents:
import tree_info;
import ecoregion_common;

# Species dimension. The existing `species` key already serves as the canonical
# scientific-name identifier, so we extend it instead of introducing a separate
# `species_id` key and forcing downstream join changes.
property species.genus string;
property species.species_epithet string;
property species.family string;

property species.common_names list<string>; # ordered by familiarity / prevalence
property species.description string; # short ecology / appearance / urban planting note
property species.is_evergreen bool;

property species.mature_height_min_ft float;
property species.mature_height_max_ft float;
property species.canopy_spread_min_ft float;
property species.canopy_spread_max_ft float;

property species.growth_rate enum<string>['slow', 'moderate', 'fast'];
property species.lifespan_min_years int;
property species.lifespan_max_years int;

property species.drought_tolerance enum<string>['low', 'moderate', 'high'];
property species.water_needs enum<string>['low', 'moderate', 'high'];

property species.sun_exposure list<enum<string>['full_sun', 'partial_shade', 'shade']>;
property species.soil_preferences list<string>; # clay | loam | sandy | rocky | well_drained | moist
property species.root_behavior enum<string>['non_invasive', 'moderate', 'invasive'];

property species.coastal_tolerance bool;
property species.salt_tolerance bool;
property species.pollution_tolerance string; # low | moderate | high

property species.bloom_months list<int>; # 1-12
property species.wildlife_value enum<string>['low', 'moderate', 'high'];
property species.fire_risk enum<string>['low', 'moderate', 'high'];

property species.tree_form string; # broadleaf | conifer | palm | columnar | ornamental | spreading | weeping | multi_trunk | default

property species.usda_zone_min int;
property species.usda_zone_max int;

property species.native_ecoregions list<int>; # list of ecoregion_id values where the species is native

property species.enriched_at datetime;

auto tree_eco_region<- unnest(native_ecoregions);

merge tree_eco_region into ecoregion_id;


# Root datasource: runs the Python script to fetch and enrich new species.
# Emits the full merged table (existing + newly enriched rows).
root datasource raw_tree_enrichment (
    species,
    ?genus,
    ?species_epithet,
    ?family,
    ?common_names,
    ?description,
    ?is_evergreen,
    ?mature_height_min_ft,
    ?mature_height_max_ft,
    ?canopy_spread_min_ft,
    ?canopy_spread_max_ft,
    ?growth_rate,
    ?lifespan_min_years,
    ?lifespan_max_years,
    ?drought_tolerance,
    ?water_needs,
    ?sun_exposure,
    ?soil_preferences,
    ?root_behavior,
    ?coastal_tolerance,
    ?salt_tolerance,
    ?pollution_tolerance,
    ?bloom_months,
    ?wildlife_value,
    ?fire_risk,
    ?tree_form,
    ?usda_zone_min,
    ?usda_zone_max,
    ?native_ecoregions,
    enriched_at,
)
grain (species)
file `./tree_enrichment.py`;

# Cached datasource: reads/writes the persisted parquet in GCS.
# Use this for day-to-day queries to avoid re-running enrichment.
datasource tree_enrichment (
    species,
    ?genus,
    ?species_epithet,
    ?family,
    ?common_names,
    ?description,
    ?is_evergreen,
    ?mature_height_min_ft,
    ?mature_height_max_ft,
    ?canopy_spread_min_ft,
    ?canopy_spread_max_ft,
    ?growth_rate,
    ?lifespan_min_years,
    ?lifespan_max_years,
    ?drought_tolerance,
    ?water_needs,
    ?sun_exposure,
    ?soil_preferences,
    ?root_behavior,
    ?coastal_tolerance,
    ?salt_tolerance,
    ?pollution_tolerance,
    ?bloom_months,
    ?wildlife_value,
    ?fire_risk,
    ?tree_form,
    ?usda_zone_min,
    ?usda_zone_max,
    ?native_ecoregions,
    enriched_at,
)
grain (species)
file f`https://storage.googleapis.com/trilogy_public_models/duckdb/trees/tree_enrichment_v{data_version}.parquet`:f`gcs://trilogy_public_models/duckdb/trees/tree_enrichment_v{data_version}.parquet`
freshness by `./tree_enrichment_probe.py`;

import std.geography;
import core;

key tree_id string; # unique identifier for the tree record (prefixed: sf-<id> or nyc-<id>)
key species string; # scientific species name (Latin binomial, no common-name suffix)
property tree_id.tree_name string; # original name field from source data, which may be unique to certain trees
property tree_id.plant_date date; # date the tree was planted
property tree_id.diameter_at_breast_height float; # diameter at breast height - standard forestry measure of tree diameter at about 4.5 feet above ground
property tree_id.latitude float::latitude; # geographic latitude for mapping
property tree_id.longitude float::longitude; # geographic longitude for mapping



property <*>.ussfo_data_updated_through datetime; # when SF data is through
property <*>.usnyc_data_updated_through datetime; # when NYC data is through
# defined in boston dataset as it's a erivation
# property <*>.usbos_data_updated_through datetime; # when Boston data is through
property <*>.frpar_data_updated_through datetime; # when Paris data is through
property <*>.usbtv_data_updated_through datetime; # when Burlington VT data is through

import ecoregion_common;

key city enum<string>['USSFO', 'USNYC', 'USBOS', 'FRPAR', 'USBTV']; # UN/LOCODE for the source city (e.g. USSFO, USNYC, USBOS, FRPAR)
property city.ecoregion_id <- case
    when city = 'USSFO' then 423
    when city = 'USNYC' then 339
    when city = 'USBOS' then 339
    when city = 'FRPAR' then 664
    when city = 'USBTV' then 334
end; # mapped from RESOLVE ecoregion at each city centroid

param data_version string default '2';

import core;
import ecoregion_common;

root datasource ecoregion_update_time (
    data_updated_through: ecoregion_data_updated_through
)
file `./ecoregion_update_time.py`;


root datasource raw_ecoregion_info (
    ecoregion_id,
    ecoregion_name,
    ?realm,
    ?biome,
    ?biome_code,
    ?realm_code,
    ?country_codes,
    ?centroid_lat,
    ?centroid_lon,
    ?geometry_geojson,
    ?bbox_min_lat,
    ?bbox_min_lon,
    ?bbox_max_lat,
    ?bbox_max_lon,
    ?is_terrestrial,
    ?source_version,
)
grain (ecoregion_id)
file `./ecoregion_info.py`;


datasource ecoregion_info (
    ecoregion_id,
    ecoregion_name,
    ?realm,
    ?biome,
    ?biome_code,
    ?realm_code,
    ?country_codes,
    ?centroid_lat,
    ?centroid_lon,
    ?geometry_geojson,
    ?bbox_min_lat,
    ?bbox_min_lon,
    ?bbox_max_lat,
    ?bbox_max_lon,
    ?is_terrestrial,
    ?source_version,
    ecoregion_data_updated_through,
)
grain (ecoregion_id)
file f`https://storage.googleapis.com/trilogy_public_models/duckdb/trees/ecoregion_info_v{data_version}.parquet`:f`gcs://trilogy_public_models/duckdb/trees/ecoregion_info_v{data_version}.parquet`
freshness by ecoregion_data_updated_through;

import ..tree_common;

root datasource paris_update_time (
    data_updated_through: frpar_data_updated_through
)
file `./paris_update_time.py`;

root partial datasource paris_raw_tree_info (
    tree_id: tree_id,
    city: city,
    species: species,
    tree_name: ?tree_name,
    plant_date: ?plant_date,
    latitude: ?latitude,
    longitude: ?longitude,
    diameter_at_breast_height: ?diameter_at_breast_height,
)
grain (tree_id)
complete where city = 'FRPAR'
file `./paris_tree_info.py`;


partial datasource paris_tree_info (
    tree_id,
    city,
    species,
    ?tree_name,
    ?plant_date,
    ?diameter_at_breast_height,
    ?latitude,
    ?longitude,
    frpar_data_updated_through,
)
grain (tree_id)
complete where city = 'FRPAR'
file f`https://storage.googleapis.com/trilogy_public_models/duckdb/trees/frpar_tree_info_v{data_version}.parquet`:f`gcs://trilogy_public_models/duckdb/trees/frpar_tree_info_v{data_version}.parquet`
freshness by frpar_data_updated_through;

import ..tree_common;

property <*>.arboretum_data_updated_through datetime; # when Arnold Arboretum data is through
property <*>.boston_city_data_updated_through datetime; # when Boston city open-data is through
property <*>.cambridge_data_updated_through datetime; # when Cambridge open-data is through
auto usbos_data_updated_through <- greatest(boston_city_data_updated_through, arboretum_data_updated_through, cambridge_data_updated_through);
key usbos_source enum<string>['CITY', 'ARBORETUM', 'CAMBRIDGE']; # data source within Boston metro (CITY = Boston municipal, ARBORETUM = Arnold Arboretum, CAMBRIDGE = Cambridge municipal)


property tree_id._raw_dbh float; # raw value 

property tree_id._cleaned_db <- case when _raw_dbh < 0 then null else _raw_dbh end; # replace negative values with null

auto processed_dbh <- coalesce(_cleaned_db, avg(_cleaned_db) by city, species); # replace 0 with null, then impute missing values with species average within each city
# --- Freshness probes ---

merge processed_dbh into diameter_at_breast_height;

root datasource boston_update_time (
    data_updated_through: boston_city_data_updated_through
)
file `./boston_update_time.py`;

root datasource arboretum_update_time (
    data_updated_through: arboretum_data_updated_through
)
file `./arboretum_update_time.py`;

root datasource cambridge_update_time (
    data_updated_through: cambridge_data_updated_through
)
file `./cambridge_update_time.py`;

# --- Raw sources ---

root partial datasource city_raw_tree_info (
    id: tree_id,
    city: city,
    usbos_source: usbos_source,
    spp_bot: species,
    tree_name: ?tree_name,
    
    date_plant: ?plant_date,
    y_latitude: ?latitude,
    x_longitude: ?longitude,
    dbh: ?_raw_dbh,
)
grain (tree_id)
complete where city = 'USBOS' and usbos_source = 'CITY'
file `./boston_tree_info.py`;

root partial datasource arboretum_raw_tree_info (
    tree_id: tree_id,
    city: city,
    usbos_source: usbos_source,
    species: species,
    tree_name: ?tree_name,
    plant_date: ?plant_date,
    latitude: ?latitude,
    longitude: ?longitude,
    diameter_at_breast_height: ?_raw_dbh,
)
grain (tree_id)
complete where city = 'USBOS' and usbos_source = 'ARBORETUM'
file `./arboretum_tree_info.py`;

root partial datasource cambridge_raw_tree_info (
    tree_id: tree_id,
    city: city,
    usbos_source: usbos_source,
    species: species,
    tree_name: ?tree_name,
    plant_date: ?plant_date,
    latitude: ?latitude,
    longitude: ?longitude,
    diameter_at_breast_height: ?_raw_dbh,
)
grain (tree_id)
complete where city = 'USBOS' and usbos_source = 'CAMBRIDGE'
file `./cambridge_tree_info.py`;

# --- Merged materialized parquet (all Boston sources) ---

partial datasource boston_tree_info (
    tree_id,
    city,
    usbos_source,
    species,
    ?tree_name,
    ?diameter_at_breast_height,
    ?plant_date,
    ?latitude,
    ?longitude,
    usbos_data_updated_through
)
grain (tree_id)
complete where city = 'USBOS'
file f`https://storage.googleapis.com/trilogy_public_models/duckdb/trees/usbos_tree_info_v{data_version}.parquet`:f`gcs://trilogy_public_models/duckdb/trees/usbos_tree_info_v{data_version}.parquet`
freshness by usbos_data_updated_through;

import ..tree_common;

root datasource burlington_update_time (
    data_updated_through: usbtv_data_updated_through
)
file `./burlington_update_time.py`;
